meta.sourceRequest: Add organization-scoped OAuth with audit-safe rollback

objective: Add organization-scoped OAuth without breaking existing user login flows.
constraints: Must preserve current public API behavior for existing clients
Must satisfy auth and audit policies
assumptions: Existing auth service can host provider configuration
nonGoals: No SSO vendor marketplace in v1

tradeoffs.tension: faster integrated rollout vs lower-risk shadow deployment
tradeoffs.chosenDirection: shadow deployment followed by gated cutover

recommendedLanes.why: auth and rollback risk justify tradeoff review
implementation, tests, docs, and security review can run concurrently

launchHints: reserve security-reviewer for auth surface review
handoff to completion loop only if cutover evidence is incomplete

planSteps.title: Map current auth boundaries and rollback constraints
planSteps.description: Inspect auth service, session issuance, and audit logging touchpoints.

planSteps.title: Implement provider integration behind feature flag
planSteps.description: Add org-scoped provider config and disabled-by-default auth path.

planSteps.title: Add integration and regression coverage
planSteps.description: Verify happy path, denial path, rollback, and audit trail emission.
